_comment: Go-pair baseline cfgs expressible by the frozen grid_floatstop_bt.py core engine (atr_mult/ci_threshold/b48_hours/lot/max_levels/float_stop/quote_jpy + tp_mult/tp_level_mults/ptp_frac/ptp_mult). Live v8 configs also layer regime_short/mom_thr/cull_frac/taper/dir_mode, which the core BT does not implement (derived-engine only, see grid_loop_engineering_design.md sec 7.5 and CLAUDE.md sec 2). Phase 0 candidates are these baselines plus a gain-side delta (tp_level_mults or ptp_frac/ptp_mult) only.
_sources: CLAUDE.md 'GridAIループヨンジニアリング設計' sec2 (magic/params) + optimizer/grid_corrcross_screen.py QUOTE_JPY for CADCHF/EURGBP/AUDNZD quote factors
